text.content: MAXAM TIRE ANNOUNCES CUSTOMER SERVICE TEAM EXPANSION

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM TIRE ANNOUNCES CUSTOMER SERVICE TEAM EXPANSION

text.content: MAXAM accelerates growth and focus on customer support

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM accelerates growth and focus on customer support

text.content: [Danvers, Massachusetts, Jan 30th, 2020] To accommodate rapid growth and leverage customer support services, MAXAM Tire is pleased to announce the expansion of the Customer Service Team based in Danvers, Massachusetts.

rich_text.plain_text: [Danvers, Massachusetts, Jan 30th, 2020] To accommodate rapid growth and leverage customer support services, MAXAM Tire is pleased to announce the expansion of the Customer Service Team based in Danvers, Massachusetts.

text.content:
Quality
that drives productivity is a core value at MAXAM Tire which motivates our team
at every level from manufacturing and logistics to distribution and customer
service. This strong commitment to customer satisfaction pushes MAXAM’s dedicated
team to provide the best customer experience and the ongoing improvement of our
products and services.

rich_text.plain_text:
Quality
that drives productivity is a core value at MAXAM Tire which motivates our team
at every level from manufacturing and logistics to distribution and customer
service. This strong commitment to customer satisfaction pushes MAXAM’s dedicated
team to provide the best customer experience and the ongoing improvement of our
products and services.

text.content:
With
major investment and continued growth in our specialty segments such as mining
and forestry tire products, the MAXAM dealer network has grown substantially.
To meet the expansion of our dealer base, MAXAM has brought on additional Customer
Service Representatives (CSR) to provide knowledgeable assistance on
account-related matters. It is essential that the MAXAM customer service team provide
customers with a proficient ordering process and continue to grow established
key relationships.

rich_text.plain_text:
With
major investment and continued growth in our specialty segments such as mining
and forestry tire products, the MAXAM dealer network has grown substantially.
To meet the expansion of our dealer base, MAXAM has brought on additional Customer
Service Representatives (CSR) to provide knowledgeable assistance on
account-related matters. It is essential that the MAXAM customer service team provide
customers with a proficient ordering process and continue to grow established
key relationships.

text.content:
“The
decision to expand our customer service team in Boston was a logical step into
our business growth strategy. Boston is filled with diverse talent and with the
MAXAM Global Dealer Servicing Network growing over 1,800 strong, we need a
dedicated group of people to help us stay true to our mission of being a valuable
business solutions provider,” says Troy Kline, President of MAXAM Tire North
America.

rich_text.plain_text:
“The
decision to expand our customer service team in Boston was a logical step into

business solutions provider,” says Troy Kline, President of MAXAM Tire North
America.

text.content:
Absolute satisfaction is of paramount importance to MAXAM
Tire, as we pride ourselves in providing a top-quality customer experience. The
addition of new Customer Service Representatives will allow MAXAM Tire to
maintain consistent efficiency and quality support that our customers can count
on.

text.content:
For more information, please contact your local MAXAM
Tire representative or visit MAXAMTIRE.COM.
